verdict_reason: Prior items 3 (unpinned emulator tag) and 4 (no healthcheck) are resolved, but the new nc-based CMD-SHELL healthcheck cannot execute in the distroless emulator image, so the gateway's service_healthy dependency permanently blocks the local stack from starting.

todos.issue: New servicebus-emulator healthcheck (added to fix prior item 4) uses CMD-SHELL nc, but the 1.1.2 image is distroless — it has no /bin/sh and no nc binary (verified: docker run --entrypoint /bin/sh|/usr/bin/sh|/bin/bash|nc all exit 127), so every probe fails, the container goes unhealthy and the gateway's condition: service_healthy dependency blocks 'docker compose --profile services up' from ever starting the gateway
todos.fix: Probe from outside the container instead: add a one-shot helper service (e.g. busybox running until nc -z servicebus-emulator 5672 succeeds) and have the gateway depend on it with condition: service_completed_successfully; or revert the emulator dependency to service_started and rely on client-side connection retry
